layers.name: Agent Core / Seed Loop
layers.summary: The ~100-line autonomous execution loop, tool dispatch, and the 9 atomic tools — the seed kernel

classes.name: agent_runner_loop
classes.signature: def agent_runner_loop(client, system_prompt, user_input, handler, tools_schema, max_turns=40, verbose=True, initial_user_content=None, yield_info=False):
classes.description_zh: Agent 的核心自主循环：感知环境→推理→调用工具→写入记忆→再循环，约 100 行驱动整个执行流程
classes.description_en: The ~100-line core autonomous loop — perceive state, reason, dispatch tools, write memory, repeat — that drives the whole agent

classes.name: GenericAgent
classes.description_zh: 顶层 Agent 编排器：装配系统提示、工具 schema、LLM 会话与分层记忆，并驱动 agent_runner_loop
classes.description_en: Top-level agent orchestrator that assembles the system prompt, tool schema, LLM session and layered memory, then drives the runner loop

classes.name: GenericAgentHandler
classes.description_zh: 工具处理器：以 do_ 前缀实现 9 个原子工具（code_run / file_* / web_* / ask_user / memory），由循环的 dispatch 调用
classes.description_en: Tool handler implementing the 9 atomic tools as do_-prefixed methods (code_run / file_* / web_* / ask_user / memory), invoked by the loop dispatch

classes.name: code_run
classes.signature: def code_run(code, code_type="python", timeout=60, cwd=None, code_cwd=None, stop_signal=None, maxlen=10000, myprint=safe_print):
classes.description_zh: code_run 原子工具：执行任意 Python / PowerShell / bash 代码——Agent 借此动态装依赖、写脚本、把临时能力固化为技能
classes.description_en: code_run atomic tool: execute arbitrary Python / PowerShell / bash — the agent uses it to install deps, write scripts, and crystallize new abilities at runtime

classes.name: ask_user
classes.description_zh: ask_user 原子工具：人在回路确认，向用户提问并可附候选项
classes.description_en: ask_user atomic tool: human-in-the-loop confirmation — pose a question with optional candidate choices

classes.name: file_patch
classes.signature: def file_patch(path: str, old_content: str, new_content: str):
classes.description_zh: file_patch 原子工具：在文件中定位唯一的 old_content 块并替换为 new_content
classes.description_en: file_patch atomic tool: find the unique old_content block in a file and replace it with new_content

classes.name: file_read
classes.signature: def file_read(path, start=1, keyword=None, count=200, show_linenos=True):
classes.description_zh: file_read 原子工具：读取文件内容（支持行范围）
classes.description_en: file_read atomic tool: read file contents (with optional line range)

layers.name: LLM Core
layers.summary: Multi-provider model clients (Claude / OpenAI-native / tool-calling), history compression, token budgeting

classes.name: reload_mykeys
classes.description_zh: 密钥热加载：监测 mykey.py/json 变更并重新载入 API key 与模型配置
classes.description_en: Hot-reload of mykey.py/json — re-imports API keys and model config when the file changes

classes.name: compress_history_tags
classes.signature: def compress_history_tags(messages, keep_recent=10, max_len=800, force=False, interval=5):

classes.name: trim_messages_history
classes.description_zh: 上下文裁剪：在超出 context_win 字符上限时裁剪历史消息，维持 <30K 低上下文
classes.description_en: Context trimmer: prune history messages when they exceed the context_win char cap, holding the <30K low-context budget

classes.name: _record_usage
classes.description_zh: Token 用量记账：累计每次调用的输入/输出 token，供成本追踪
classes.description_en: Token-usage accounting: tally input/output tokens per call for cost tracking

classes.name: _openai_stream
classes.description_zh: OpenAI 兼容流式核心：发起 chat/responses 请求并增量解析 SSE，含重试
classes.description_en: OpenAI-compatible streaming core: issue chat/responses requests and incrementally parse SSE, with retry

classes.name: BaseSession
classes.description_zh: LLM 会话基类：管理消息历史、压缩、缓存标记与重试，派生出各 provider 会话
classes.description_en: Base LLM session: manages message history, compression, cache markers and retries; parent of all provider sessions

classes.name: ClaudeSession
classes.description_zh: Claude 兼容会话：经 OpenAI 兼容/中转通道访问 Anthropic 模型
classes.description_en: Claude-compatible session: reaches Anthropic models via OpenAI-compatible/relay channels

classes.name: _fix_messages
classes.description_zh: 消息修正：规整 provider 间不兼容的消息序列（孤立 tool_result、thinking 块等）
classes.description_en: Message fixer: normalize cross-provider message sequences (orphan tool_results, thinking blocks, etc.)

classes.name: NativeClaudeSession
classes.description_zh: 原生 Anthropic 会话：直连 Messages API，解析 SSE 流与 tool_use/thinking 内容块
classes.description_en: Native Anthropic session: talks to the Messages API directly, parsing the SSE stream and tool_use/thinking blocks

classes.name: ToolClient
classes.description_zh: 工具调用 LLM 客户端：统一封装多 provider 的带工具调用对话，是 Agent 与模型交互的主入口
classes.description_en: Tool-calling LLM client: a unified multi-provider chat-with-tools wrapper — the agent's main entry to the model

classes.name: _parse_text_tool_calls
classes.description_zh: 工具调用回退解析：当模型未用原生 tool_use 块时，从文本中抽取工具调用
classes.description_en: Fallback parser that extracts tool calls from plain text when the model emits no native tool_use blocks

classes.name: resolve_session
classes.description_zh: 会话解析器：按 mykey 配置选择并实例化合适的模型会话（Claude / OpenAI-native / 工具调用）
classes.description_en: Session resolver: pick and instantiate the right model session (Claude / OpenAI-native / tool-calling) from mykey config

classes.name: log
classes.description_zh: SuperGrok 代理的日志辅助
classes.description_en: Logging helper for the SuperGrok proxy

classes.name: TokenManager
classes.description_zh: SuperGrok 代理的令牌管理：登录、缓存与自动刷新 grok 访问令牌
classes.description_en: SuperGrok proxy token manager: login, cache and auto-refresh grok access tokens

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: SuperGrok 本地代理 CLI 入口：login / refresh / serve / models / test 子命令
classes.description_en: SuperGrok local-proxy CLI entry: login / refresh / serve / models / test subcommands

layers.name: Web & Browser Control
layers.summary: Web perception (HTML simplification) and real-browser control via a CDP bridge / web driver

classes.name: TMWebDriver
classes.description_zh: 浏览器驱动：通过 CDP 桥接注入真实浏览器（保留登录态），统一执行 JS、读取页面、管理标签页
classes.description_en: Browser driver that injects into a real browser via a CDP bridge (sessions preserved) to run JS, read pages, and manage tabs

classes.name: get_html
classes.signature: def get_html(driver, cutlist=False, maxchars=35000, instruction="", extra_js="", text_only=False):
classes.description_zh: 网页感知核心：将原始 DOM 优化压缩为面向 token 的简化 HTML，并可监测页面变化
classes.description_en: Web-perception core: optimize/compress raw DOM into token-friendly simplified HTML and track page changes

classes.name: web_scan
classes.description_zh: web_scan 原子工具：抓取当前页面的简化 HTML 与标签页列表，过滤边栏/浮动等非主体内容以省 token
classes.description_en: web_scan atomic tool: capture the current page as simplified HTML plus the tab list, stripping sidebars/overlays to save tokens

classes.name: web_execute_js
classes.description_zh: web_execute_js 原子工具：在真实浏览器中执行 JS 控制页面，并捕获返回值与页面变化
classes.description_en: web_execute_js atomic tool: run JS in the real browser to drive the page, capturing the return value and DOM changes

classes.name: handleExtMessage
classes.description_zh: 浏览器扩展后台：分发来自页面/弹窗的扩展消息到对应处理器
classes.description_en: Browser-extension background: route extension messages from page/popup to their handlers

classes.name: handleCookies
classes.description_zh: 浏览器扩展后台：读取/同步指定域的 cookie，支撑保留登录态的浏览器控制
classes.description_en: Browser-extension background: read/sync cookies for a domain, enabling session-preserving browser control

classes.name: handleWsExec
classes.description_zh: 浏览器扩展后台：经 WebSocket 接收并执行来自驱动端的远程 JS/CDP 指令
classes.description_en: Browser-extension background: receive and execute remote JS/CDP commands from the driver over WebSocket

layers.name: Memory & Skills
layers.summary: Layered memory (L0–L4) and the self-evolution engine that crystallizes tasks into reusable skills/SOPs

classes.name: detect_environment
classes.description_zh: 环境探测：采集 OS/Shell/运行时/工具信息，作为技能检索的上下文
classes.description_en: Environment probe: collect OS/shell/runtime/tool info as context for skill retrieval

classes.name: _api_request
classes.description_zh: 技能库 API 客户端：封装带鉴权的 HTTP 请求
classes.description_en: Skill-library API client: wraps authenticated HTTP requests

classes.name: search
classes.description_zh: 技能检索引擎：向技能库服务端发起检索请求并返回结果列表
classes.description_en: Skill-search engine: issue a retrieval request to the skill-library backend and return ranked results

classes.name: _dump_native
classes.description_zh: 原生 uiautomator dump（需 idle 状态）
classes.description_en: Native uiautomator dump (requires the device to be idle)

classes.name: _parse_xml
classes.description_zh: 将 Android dump 的 XML 解析为节点列表
classes.description_en: Parse the Android dump XML into a node list

classes.name: ui
classes.description_zh: Android UI 采集：一键 dump 并解析手机界面树（优先 uiautomator2），驱动 ADB 移动端控制
classes.description_en: Android UI capture: one-shot dump + parse of the device view tree (uiautomator2 first), powering ADB mobile control

classes.name: MouseClick
classes.description_zh: 底层鼠标点击：绕过 pyautogui 直接走 win32api，提供稳定的键鼠/截图控制原语
classes.description_en: Low-level mouse click via win32api (bypassing pyautogui) — a stable keyboard/mouse/screenshot control primitive

classes.name: _ocr_rapid
classes.description_zh: RapidOCR 后端封装
classes.description_en: RapidOCR backend wrapper

classes.name: ocr_image
classes.description_zh: 本地 OCR：对 PIL 图像做文字识别
classes.description_en: Local OCR: recognize text from a PIL image

classes.name: build_rules
classes.description_zh: 进程内存扫描规则构建：为从目标进程内存提取数据生成匹配规则
classes.description_en: Build process-memory scan rules to extract data from a target process's memory

classes.name: scan_memory
classes.signature: def scan_memory(pid, pattern, context_size=256, mode='auto', llm_mode=False):

classes.name: _yolo
classes.description_zh: YOLO 元素检测：优先走跨进程 daemon 缓存，失败回退本地推理
classes.description_en: YOLO element detection — prefers a cross-process daemon cache, falling back to local inference

classes.name: _ocr_crops_batch
classes.description_zh: 批量 OCR：把所有 YOLO 框垂直拼成一张图一次识别，再按坐标映射回各框
classes.description_en: Batch OCR: stack all YOLO crops into one image for a single OCR pass, then map text back by coordinates

classes.name: detect
classes.description_zh: 屏幕 UI 元素检测统一入口：YOLO 定位 + RapidOCR 识别，返回可点击元素列表，支撑视觉操作
classes.description_en: Unified screen UI-element detector: YOLO localization + RapidOCR, returning clickable elements for vision-driven control

classes.name: ask_vision
classes.signature: def ask_vision(image_input, prompt="详细描述这张图片的内容", timeout=60, max_pixels=1440000, backend=DEFAULT_BACKEND):
classes.description_zh: 视觉问答：把截图发给多模态模型并返回理解结果，是 GUI 视觉感知的入口
classes.description_en: Vision Q&A: send a screenshot to a multimodal model and return its understanding — the GUI vision entry

classes.name: _call_openai_compat
classes.signature: def _call_openai_compat(b64, prompt, timeout, *, apibase, apikey, model, proxy=None):

classes.name: _detect_format
classes.description_zh: 探测会话日志格式（JSON vs 原始文本）
classes.description_en: Detect the session-log format (JSON vs raw text)

classes.name: compress_session
classes.description_zh: L4 会话归档：将原始 model_responses 日志压缩为精简的长程记忆档案
classes.description_en: L4 session archival: compress a raw model_responses log into a distilled long-horizon memory record

classes.name: _compress_raw
classes.description_zh: 压缩原始格式日志：剥离系统提示与 assistant 回显
classes.description_en: Compress raw-format logs by stripping the system prompt and assistant echo

classes.name: extract_history
classes.description_zh: 从会话文件中抽取 [USER]/[Agent] 历史，供长程记忆复用
classes.description_en: Extract [USER]/[Agent] history from a session file for long-horizon recall

classes.name: batch_process
classes.description_zh: 批量压缩+抽取+归档会话日志（默认 dry-run 安全）
classes.description_en: Batch compress + extract + archive session logs (dry-run by default)

classes.name: complete_task
classes.signature: def complete_task(taskname: str, historyline: str, report_path: str) -> str:

classes.name: format_results
classes.signature: def format_results(results: list[SearchResult], env: dict, query: str) -> str:

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: 技能检索 CLI 入口：python -m skill_search，命令行检索/统计技能库
classes.description_en: Skill-search CLI entry (python -m skill_search): search/stat the skill library from the shell

layers.name: Reflection & Orchestration
layers.summary: Goal mode, scheduler/cron, multi-worker hive, sub-agent team — long-horizon autonomous orchestration

classes.name: lifespan
classes.signature: async def lifespan(app: FastAPI): # 服务启动（事件循环已就绪）：捕获 loop 供工作线程跨线程推 WS 广播，并起主agent

classes.description_zh: 生成短 ID
classes.description_en: Generate a short id

classes.description_zh: 清洗子 Agent 日志文本用于展示
classes.description_en: Clean sub-agent log text for display

classes.name: schedule_broadcast
classes.description_zh: 调度对 WebSocket 客户端的状态广播
classes.description_en: Schedule a state broadcast to WebSocket clients

classes.description_en: Push sub-agent status cards to the frontend

classes.description_en: Append a message to a sub-agent's chat

classes.description_zh: 子 Agent 池：管理并行子 Agent 的生命周期与状态
classes.description_en: Sub-agent pool: manage the lifecycle and state of parallel sub-agents

classes.name: Conductor
classes.description_zh: 指挥官：FastAPI 服务，编排并监督多个并行子 Agent（生成/审批/清理），实现一等委派
classes.description_en: Conductor: a FastAPI service that spawns, supervises and auto-cleans parallel sub-agents — first-class delegation

classes.name: _poll_bbs
classes.description_zh: 从 BBS 协调板轮询其他 worker 的进展
classes.description_en: Poll the BBS coordination board for other workers' progress

classes.name: check
classes.description_zh: 清单主控：核对长程任务的检查清单完成度并推进下一步
classes.description_en: Checklist master: verify a long-horizon task's checklist and drive the next step

classes.name: _prompt
classes.description_zh: 为清单核对步骤构造提示
classes.description_en: Build the prompt for a checklist-verification step

classes.name: _load
classes.description_zh: 目标模式状态加载：恢复「持续优化 X N 小时」的时间预算驱动循环
classes.description_en: Load Goal-mode state: restore the time-budget-driven "keep optimizing X for N hours" loop

classes.name: check
classes.signature: def check(): # L4 archive cron (silent, every 12h)
classes.description_zh: 定时调度器：按 repeat 冷却周期判断任务是否到点，驱动 cron 式自主任务
classes.description_en: Scheduler tick: decide whether a task is due by its repeat cooldown, driving cron-style autonomous jobs

classes.description_en: Hot-reload coordination-board config when it changes

classes.description_en: API-token auth check for the Hive BBS

classes.name: poll
classes.description_zh: Hive BBS 服务：worker 轮询协调板上的新帖/任务
classes.description_en: Hive BBS service: workers poll the coordination board for new posts/tasks

classes.name: render_segments
classes.signature: def render_segments(segments, suffix=''): # 整块重画：调用方用 slot.container() 包裹，保证 DOM 路径稳定、跨 rerun 对齐（消除"灰色重影"）。 # heartbeat 空转时 segments 不变 → Streamlit 后端 diff 无变化 → 前端零闪烁； # 但 container/markdown 本身是 API 调用，StopException 仍会被抛出（abort 照常起作用）。

classes.name: _tile
classes.signature: def _tile(s: str, style: str, width: int | None = None) -> str: # Re-assert style after every reset so muted-markdown \x1b[0m can't punch # a hole in the block. When `width` is provided we pad with explicit # bg-active spaces — prompt-toolkit's cell renderer doesn't honour # \x1b[K (erase-to-EOL) inside its own buffer, so PTK-bound scrollback # would otherwise leave the row gap exposed. Fall back to \x1b[K for # legacy callers writing straight to the terminal (no PTK), where the # erase command still fills correctly.

classes.name: _border
classes.signature: def _border(left: str, right: str, width: int, style: str = _BORDER) -> str:

classes.name: _arg_hint
classes.signature: def _arg_hint(name: str, args: str, body: str) -> str:

classes.name: _result_preview
classes.signature: def _result_preview(result: str, max_rows: int, row_w: int) -> list[str]:

classes.name: _chip_box
classes.signature: def _chip_box(tid_str: str, combo: str, st: str, w: int, result: str = '') -> list[str]:

classes.name: _pet
classes.signature: def _pet(el: float, frame: int) -> str: # `frame` ticks at the spinner rate (0.1s). Pet emotes feel frantic if # they swap every tick, so callers divide the spin counter (currently /5) # to land a ~0.5s pet-frame cadence while the spinner glyph stays snappy.

classes.name: _set_term_title
classes.signature: def _set_term_title(text: str) -> None: # PTK app run redirects sys.stdout to sb_agent.log (see # _run_prompt_toolkit), so sys.stdout.write here would write OSC 0 # into the log file instead of the terminal — title silently # frozen at the very first pre-PTK call. Write straight to fd 1 # via os.write, same approach as _w().

classes.description_en: Interactive setup-wizard entry: guide LLM/platform configuration and generate mykey.py

flows.name: 初始化配置向导 / Setup Wizard
flows.description: 交互式引导配置 LLM 与消息平台，探测模型并生成 mykey.py
flows.description_en: Interactively configure LLMs and messaging platforms, probe models, and generate mykey.py

flows.name: 聊天机器人前端 / Chat-Bot Frontend
flows.description: 以飞书为代表的 IM 机器人前端：经共享 AgentChatMixin 把消息平台接成 Agent 对话界面
flows.description_en: A representative IM-bot frontend (Feishu): wires a messaging platform into the agent via the shared AgentChatMixin

flows.name: CLI 命令分发 / CLI Command Dispatch
flows.description: ga 命令行入口：列出并启动各前端/工具进程、查状态、git pull 更新
flows.description_en: The ga CLI entry: list and launch frontends/tools, check status, and git-pull update

flows.name: 技能检索 / Skill Search
flows.description: 采集环境上下文后查询技能库 API，返回最相关的可复用技能
flows.description_en: Collect environment context, query the skill-library API, and return the most relevant reusable skills

flows.name: TUI 交互前端 / TUI Frontend
flows.description: Textual 终端前端：渲染流式输出、处理斜杠命令并桥接 Agent 会话
flows.description_en: Textual terminal frontend: render streaming output, handle slash commands, and bridge the agent session

flows.name: LLM 会话与流式 / LLM Session & Streaming
flows.description: 多 provider 模型会话：构造请求、流式解析 SSE、抽取 tool_use/thinking，并裁剪上下文
flows.description_en: Multi-provider model session: build the request, parse the SSE stream, extract tool_use/thinking, and trim context

flows.name: Agent 工具循环 / Agent Tool Loop
flows.description: 工具处理器分发 9 个原子工具——感知、推理后由模型选择并执行 code_run/file_*/web_* 等
flows.description_en: The tool handler dispatches the 9 atomic tools — after perceive/reason the model picks and runs code_run/file_*/web_*/…

flows.name: 桌面 Web 前端 / Desktop Web UI
flows.description: Tauri 桌面壳的 Web UI：提交输入、轮询消息并增量渲染会话
flows.description_en: The Tauri desktop shell's web UI: submit input, poll messages, and incrementally render the conversation

flows.name: ACP 协议桥接 / ACP Bridge
flows.description: 把 GenericAgent 暴露为 ACP 服务，供编辑器/IDE 以标准协议接入
flows.description_en: Expose GenericAgent as an ACP service so editors/IDEs can connect over a standard protocol
